expectations.evidence: Mentions ~1000 tokens redundant I/O from each agent re-reading same file
Dispatch all 8 agents in a single parallel Agent() call (one tool-use block)
Read SKILL.md once in the orchestrator; pass only the relevant section to each agent
Uses ## Summary header, not ## Efficiency [verdict] — no Savings available or Status fields

notes: Strong baseline (CLAUDE.md provides model-tier context). Miss: output format. Notably misestimates re-read waste (1000 tokens is low; actual would be 400 lines × 8 = 3200+ lines). Skill's ~85% estimate is more accurate.
